tweet.text:
New season, new challenges! Ready to crush it and reach new heights? Let's go! 💪🔥
Big thanks to Treviglio Basket for hosting me for these training sessions! 🤝 https://t.co/vDhnAd4Up0

Un estratto dell’intervista rilasciata a @SkySport insieme a @gallofede9 📺🏀
#basket #NBA https://t.co/a20eHYUG1x
